message:
fix(drasi): dynamic line positioning and working node controls (#7868)

* fix(drasi): dynamic line positioning and working node controls

Addresses two issues:

1. Flow lines didn't terminate at the block edges because the SVG used
   hardcoded viewBox percentages while nodes were laid out by CSS grid.
   Lines floated loose from the cards.

2. Stop, expand, and pin buttons were visual-only — clicking them did
   nothing.

Changes:
- Measure every node's bounding box via refs + ResizeObserver and compute
  SVG paths from real pixel coordinates. Lines now terminate exactly at
  each block's edge.
- Stop button: toggles node active/stopped state. Stopped nodes are faded,
  show a grey status dot, and their incoming/outgoing lines become dashed
  (no flow dots).
- Expand button: opens a detail modal showing the node's ID, kind, and
  type-specific metadata.
- Pin button (queries only): locks the selected query so clicking another
  query doesn't switch the results table away.
- Add gear (configure) button to sources and queries per product feedback:
  - Source config modal: edit name + source type (HTTP/POSTGRES/COSMOSDB/
    GREMLIN/SQL)
  - Query config modal: edit name + query type (CYPHER/GREMLIN/SQL) +
    query body textarea
  - Saves persist to the demo data (reactions have no gear).
- Demo regeneration now preserves user edits to sources/queries — only the
  result rows refresh.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(drasi): full-width default, resize-stable dots, stats demo values

Fold three additional fixes into this PR based on production feedback:

1. Drasi card defaults to full width (w:12, h:8) — was w:6 (portrait).
   Matches the reference image which fills the dashboard width.

2. Flow dots no longer stretch during container resize. Root cause: the
   SVG used `inset-0` which forced 100% CSS width while the viewBox
   lagged a frame behind during ResizeObserver firings, producing a
   non-1:1 scale until the next render. Switch to explicit pixel sizing
   via inline style and observe every node + window resize so the
   container dimensions update synchronously with the viewBox.

3. Stats overview showed "—" instead of demo counts (3/4/1). Root cause:
   DashboardPage passes `hasData={hasRealData}` to StatsOverview, which
   renders "—" for any block when hasData is false, overriding the
   demo values returned by getStatValue. Pass `hasData={hasRealData ||
   isDemoData}` so StatsOverview accepts the values in demo mode.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* chore: retrigger Netlify deploy

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

-  defaultWidth: 6,
+  defaultWidth: 12,
   defaultHeight: 8,
   dataSource: { type: 'hook', hook: 'useDrasiResources' },
   content: { type: 'custom' },
